data.name: buttonApplyMask.ToolTip
data.value: Mask the currently previewed region: exclude those pixels from the fit (residual) so they are ignored when matching the simulation.

data.name: buttonMaskAll.ToolTip
data.value: Mask every pixel of the image (exclude the whole image from the fit).

data.name: buttonSaveMask.ToolTip
data.value: Save the current mask to a .mas file so it can be reloaded later.

data.name: buttonUnmask.ToolTip
data.value: Unmask the currently previewed region: include those pixels back into the fit.

data.name: buttonUnmaskAll.ToolTip
data.value: Clear all masks: include every pixel back into the fit.

data.name: checkBoxFilmBlur.ToolTip
data.value: Apply film blur: convolve the simulated rings with an instrumental point-spread (Gaussian) of the width set at right (µm) to mimic detector/film smearing.

data.name: checkBoxMaskDiffractionPeaks.ToolTip
checkBoxMaskDonut.ToolTip
checkBoxMaskManual.ToolTip
data.value: Mask mode: paint masks directly on the image with the mouse using the shape chosen below (spot/circle/rectangle/donut); mutually exclusive with other mask modes.

data.name: checkBoxMaskRectangle.ToolTip
checkBoxRectangleIsBothSide.ToolTip
data.value: Apply the band mask symmetrically on both sides of the center line (instead of one side only).

data.name: comboBoxRectangleDirection.ToolTip
comboBoxSpotSize.ToolTip
data.value: Radius (in pixels) of the manual spot mask painted at each mouse click (1–128).

data.name: numericBoxCameraLength.ToolTip
data.value: Camera length (sample-to-detector distance) in mm; scales the radius of the simulated diffraction rings on the detector.

data.name: numericBoxCenterX.ToolTip
data.value: X pixel coordinate of the direct-beam (pattern) center; sets where the diffraction rings are centered on the image.

data.name: numericBoxCenterY.ToolTip
data.value: Y pixel coordinate of the direct-beam (pattern) center; sets where the diffraction rings are centered on the image.

data.name: numericBoxFilmBlur.ToolTip
data.value: Film-blur width in µm: the Gaussian instrumental point-spread convolved with the rings to broaden peaks (detector/film resolution).

data.name: numericBoxImageResolution.ToolTip
data.value: Detector pixel size of the source image in mm/pixel; together with camera length it converts scattering angle to ring radius in pixels.

data.name: numericBoxMonitorResolution.ToolTip
numericBoxRectangleAngle.ToolTip
data.value: Angle of the band mask in degrees (0–360°); sets the band orientation. Editable only when Direction is Free.

data.name: numericBoxRectangleBand.ToolTip
data.value: Width of the band mask in pixels (0–10000); sets how wide the masked strip is.

data.name: radioButtonManualCircle.ToolTip
data.value: Manual mask shape: drag to define a circle (from center to radius) and mask the enclosed area.

data.name: radioButtonManualDonut.ToolTip
data.value: Manual mask shape: drag two radii about the pattern center to mask an annular (donut) ring.

data.name: radioButtonManualRectangle.ToolTip
data.value: Manual mask shape: drag a rectangle (two corner points) and mask the enclosed area.

data.name: radioButtonManualSpot.ToolTip
data.value: Manual mask shape: click to mask (left) or unmask (right) a circular spot of the radius set by Size; the default mode.

data.name: sizeControl1.ToolTip
data.value: Width × height of the simulated image in pixels (1–10000); sets the canvas size of the generated diffraction pattern.

data.name: buttonSaveImage.ToolTip
data.value: Saves the current simulated diffraction pattern to an IPA image file (*.ipa), including resolution, center, camera length and wavelength.

data.name: checkBoxShowMaskedArea.ToolTip
data.value: Highlights the masked (excluded-from-fit) pixels on the image so you can see which regions are ignored.

data.name: numericBoxMaxInt.ToolTip
data.value: Upper intensity of the display brightness window (counts mapped to the brightest color). Affects display contrast only, not the data.

data.name: numericBoxMinInt.ToolTip
data.value: Lower intensity of the display brightness window (counts mapped to the darkest color). Affects display contrast only, not the data.

data.name: trackBarBgA.ToolTip
data.value: Amplitude (A) of the initial diffuse-background halo, on a logarithmic scale. Sets the peak height of the background ring used as a starting guess for fitting.

data.name: trackBarBgH.ToolTip
data.value: Width (H, full-width at half-maximum in pixels) of the initial diffuse-background halo. Larger values make the background ring broader.

data.name: trackBarBgR.ToolTip
data.value: Radius (R, in pixels from the center) of the initial diffuse-background halo. Sets where the background ring peaks.

data.name: numericBoxCircleEnd.ToolTip
data.value: Outer radius (in pixels from the center) of the annular mask. Pixels between Start and End radii are selected for masking.

data.name: numericBoxCircleStart.ToolTip
data.value: Inner radius (in pixels from the center) of the annular mask. Pixels between Start and End radii are selected for masking.

data.name: numericBoxPhi.ToolTip
data.value: Azimuth (phi) of the sample/detector tilt axis, in degrees. Sets the direction about which the pattern is tilted, affecting the orientation of ring distortion.

data.name: numericBoxTau.ToolTip
data.value: Magnitude (tau) of the sample/detector tilt about the phi axis, in degrees. Larger values distort the Debye rings from circles toward ellipses.

data.name: buttonCheckAllIndices.ToolTip
data.value: Checks every reflection (hkl) in the peak list, selecting all peaks at once.

data.name: buttonUncheckAllIndices.ToolTip
data.value: Unchecks every reflection (hkl) in the peak list, clearing the selection.

data.name: buttonUnmaskSelectedPeaks.ToolTip
data.value: Selects the image area around the rings of the checked reflections (hkl) so they can be masked.

data.name: checkedListBoxPlaneList.ToolTip
numericBoxConvergentAngle.ToolTip
data.value: Beam convergence (half-angle) of the incident radiation, in degrees. Larger values broaden the simulated Debye-ring peaks.

data.name: numericBoxMonochromaticity.ToolTip
data.value: Wavelength spread (monochromaticity, Delta-lambda / lambda) of the source, in %. Larger values broaden the simulated rings.

data.name: waveLengthControl.ToolTip
data.value: Selects the radiation source (X-ray or electron) and its wavelength used to compute the Debye-ring radii.

data.name: checkBoxResidual.ToolTip
data.value: Displays the residual (experimental minus simulated pattern), so you can see how well the fit matches. Mutually exclusive with Simulation.

data.name: checkBoxSimulation.ToolTip
data.value: Overlays the simulated pattern on the experimental image, blended by the Opacity slider. Mutually exclusive with Residual.

data.name: trackBarOpacity.ToolTip
data.value: Blending opacity (0-100%) of the simulated pattern over the experimental image in Simulation mode.

data.name: buttonSaveBackGround.ToolTip
data.value: Saves the current background parameters to a background file (*.bg) for later reuse.

data.name: checkBoxInitialBackground.ToolTip
textBoxDiffractionInformation.ToolTip
data.value: Read-only summary of the diffraction: number of crystallites contributing and the fraction of each reflection (hkl).

data.name: label11.ToolTip
data.value: Radius (in pixels) of the manual spot mask painted at each mouse click.

data.name: label13.ToolTip
data.value: X/Y pixel coordinate of the direct-beam (pattern) center; sets where the diffraction rings are centered.

data.name: label17.ToolTip
data.value: Radius (in pixels) of the manual spot mask painted at each mouse click.

data.name: label19.ToolTip
data.value: On-screen display resolution in mm/pixel; sets the zoom factor of the displayed pattern.

data.name: label2.ToolTip
data.value: Camera length (sample-to-detector distance) in mm; scales the diffraction-ring radii.

data.name: label20.ToolTip
data.value: On-screen display resolution in mm/pixel; sets the zoom factor of the displayed pattern.

data.name: label22.ToolTip
data.value: Angle of the band mask in degrees (0–360°); sets the band orientation (editable only when Direction is Free).

data.name: label23.ToolTip
data.value: Width of the band mask in pixels; sets how wide the masked strip is.

data.name: label24.ToolTip
label31.ToolTip
data.value: Detector pixel size of the source image in mm/pixel; converts scattering angle to ring radius.

data.name: label32.ToolTip
data.value: Detector pixel size of the source image in mm/pixel; converts scattering angle to ring radius.

data.name: label33.ToolTip
data.value: X pixel coordinate of the direct-beam center; sets the ring center.

data.name: label37.ToolTip
data.value: Y pixel coordinate of the direct-beam center; sets the ring center.

data.name: label39.ToolTip
data.value: Camera length (sample-to-detector distance) in mm; scales the diffraction-ring radii.

data.name: label40.ToolTip
data.value: Film-blur width in µm: Gaussian instrumental point-spread convolved with the rings to broaden peaks.

data.name: label25.ToolTip
data.value: Upper intensity of the display brightness window (counts mapped to the brightest color). Affects display contrast only, not the data.

data.name: label36.ToolTip
data.value: Lower intensity of the display brightness window (counts mapped to the darkest color). Affects display contrast only, not the data.

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: Width (H, full-width at half-maximum in pixels) of the initial diffuse-background halo. Larger values make the background ring broader.

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Radius (R, in pixels from the center) of the initial diffuse-background halo. Sets where the background ring peaks.

data.name: label8.ToolTip
data.value: Amplitude (A) of the initial diffuse-background halo, on a logarithmic scale. Sets the peak height of the background ring used as a starting guess for fitting.

data.name: label1.ToolTip
data.value: Outer radius (in pixels from the center) of the annular mask. Pixels between Start and End radii are selected for masking.

data.name: label21.ToolTip
data.value: Inner radius (in pixels from the center) of the annular mask. Pixels between Start and End radii are selected for masking.

data.name: label9.ToolTip
data.value: Inner radius (in pixels from the center) of the annular mask. Pixels between Start and End radii are selected for masking.

data.name: label28.ToolTip
data.value: Magnitude (tau) of the sample/detector tilt about the phi axis, in degrees. Larger values distort the Debye rings from circles toward ellipses.

data.name: label29.ToolTip
data.value: Azimuth (phi) of the sample/detector tilt axis, in degrees. Sets the direction about which the pattern is tilted, affecting the orientation of ring distortion.

data.name: label12.ToolTip
data.value: Beam convergence (half-angle) of the incident radiation, in degrees. Larger values broaden the simulated Debye-ring peaks.

data.name: label44.ToolTip
data.value: Wavelength spread (monochromaticity, Delta-lambda / lambda) of the source, in %. Larger values broaden the simulated rings.

data.name: label45.ToolTip
data.value: Beam convergence (half-angle) of the incident radiation, in degrees. Larger values broaden the simulated Debye-ring peaks.

data.name: label46.ToolTip
data.value: Wavelength spread (monochromaticity, Delta-lambda / lambda) of the source, in %. Larger values broaden the simulated rings.
